segments.text: Tell Aaron, his sons, and all the Israelites that this is what the Lord commands:
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Any Israelite who kills a bull, a lamb, or a goat, whether inside the camp or outside of it,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: instead of bringing it to the entrance to the Tent of Meeting to present it as an offering to the Lord there, that person shall be held guilty of illegal killing.  They have shed blood and must be expelled from their people.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: This is why the Israelites have to bring to the Lord the sacrifices they currently offer out in the fields. They must bring them to the priest at the entrance to the Tent of Meeting and offer them as peace offerings to the Lord.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: The priest will sprinkle the blood on the altar of the Lord at the entrance to the Tent of Meeting, and burn the fat to be accepted by the Lord.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: They must not continue to offer their sacrifices to the goat devils with whom they have acted like prostitutes. This is a regulation for all time and for all future generations.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Warn them that any Israelite or any foreigner living among them who offers a burnt offering or a sacrifice
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: without bringing it to the entrance to the Tent of Meeting to sacrifice it to the Lord must be expelled from their people.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: I will disown any Israelite or any foreigner living among them who eats any blood and I will expel them from their people.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Life is in the body's blood. I have given it to you so that by putting it on the altar your lives can be made right, for it is the lifeblood that makes people's lives right.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: That's why I'm warning the Israelites: None of you is allowed to eat blood, and no foreigner living among you is allowed to eat blood.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Any Israelite or foreigner living among them who hunts and kills a wild animal or a bird which are allowed be eaten must drain the blood from its body and cover it with earth,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: for life is in the body's blood. That's why I have warned the Israelites: You are not allowed to eat the blood of anything living, for life is in the body's blood. Anyone who eats it must be expelled.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Anyone, Israelite or foreigner, who eats anything found dead or killed by wild animals must wash their clothes and wash with water, and they will be unclean until the evening. Then they will be clean.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: But if they don't wash their clothes and wash themselves with water, then they bear responsibility for their guilt.
segments.speaker: Unknown
